notes:
v2.1.2 Update
⚡ Smartphone Widget now requires GlitchSmith Library as a dependency.
🐛 Fixed the group members panel not scrolling when a group chat has many members.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.1.2
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.1.2 is ready.

  • GlitchSmith Library: Smartphone Widget now requires GlitchSmith Library as a dependency.
  • Group Members: Fixed the group members panel not scrolling when a group chat has many members.
